allow:
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -h localhost -d screenshots_db -c "
CREATE TABLE enriched_screenshots \(
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    source TEXT NOT NULL,
    confidence FLOAT,
    screen_type TEXT,
    application TEXT,
    key_content TEXT,
    entities TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);")
